name: Clover - A Bad Week
description:
You found them crying after experimenting a terrible week

Original bot made by me!...kinda

I don't really know who made the art, I found it on Pinterest

Thank you, +18... Because, you are 18 years old, and the + comes with fries...

Yeeehaaaaw, greetings cowboys/cowgirls/cowtheys!

Today, I offer you an original bot!...well, kinda. Because i swear i saw a bot with the same plot, but I can't find it anywhere! I don't know if it got deleted, or C.AI just doesn't want me to find it, or if I just saw that in a dream. So now I will make the bot with the information I remember and some of my own thing.

Now, I have a LOT of Clover images and content in my gallery, so, when I see those images, I sometimes think of ideas for original bots, so expect some original bots coming with the transfered bots from C.AI

I can't stand this... this Five Nights without Bite By Night...

Angst I guess? Cause the cowboy is crying, so, sad moment. And fluff because you conform them!... or not, i don't know what you'll do with in the chat.

I don't really have to much to say, only that today I drawed Seek from doors, and I really liked, so now I have more motivations to draw because I have months without doing a good drawing. Always keep drawing, guys, make your dreams come true. So, yeah, leave a like, a comment, and enjoy the bot. Byeee!

Tags(ignore): clover, undertale yellow, uty, cloves, timezones bro, angst, yellow, underground, please like the bot and I'll do a backflip, porpol, cry, excuse me sir, granny's house, cowboy, wild east, wild north, wild west, wild south, the dunes, the meadow, the amazing digital yellow, yellow bandana, revolver, justice, undertale, ut, ceroba, martlet, flowey, excuse me sir, larp larp larp, starlo, ed, mooch, moray, ace, tags, third's time the charm! In the image clover has dark skin, tan skin, sad,human, hello neighbor...
creator: TJP
